audiences.label: Business Development
audiences.role: BTX's BD and capture team tracking programs, funding, and prime-contractor activity BTX could win build-to-print and precision-machining work on.
audiences.matters: Prioritise contract awards, solicitations, and RFPs to BTX's primes (Lockheed Martin, RTX, Northrop Grumman) and on its programs (F-35, B-21), especially machined build-to-print work BTX could subcontract for. Flag dollar values, sole-source justifications, set-aside status, and protest activity. Treat a prime's new award as a subcontracting opening.

audiences.label: Executive Brief
audiences.role: BTX leadership seeking the strategic, supply-chain, and ITAR/export-control developments that affect the business.
audiences.matters: Surface major program decisions on F-35/B-21, significant defense funding changes, supply-chain and raw-material developments affecting BTX's ability to deliver, and ITAR/EAR/DFARS export-control actions that change BTX's compliance exposure. Tie each to BTX's goal of growing defense revenue.

coverage.name: Federal Register (DoD, Air Force)
coverage.what: Proposed and final rules, notices from Defense and the Air Force

coverage.name: Defense trade press
coverage.what: Industry and program reporting (Defense News, Breaking Defense, etc.)
